title: chrysocoma aurea
intro: Chrysocoma aurea, also known as Golden Chamomile, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa, particularly in the Western Cape province. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma aurea include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, Chrysocoma aurea can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
